message:
Fix remaining cass->cm command naming in 6 more beads

Additional issues fixed via bd update:
- cass_memory_system-i57c: cass init/starters -> cm init/starters
- cass_memory_system-laui: cass playbook -> cm playbook
- cass_memory_system-zvr1: cass mark/block -> cm mark/block
- cass_memory_system-hhrv: cass undo -> cm undo
- cass_memory_system-o44i: cass decisions -> cm decisions
- cass_memory_system-yagh: cass status -> cm status

Total issues fixed across sessions: 14
- 8 initial fixes
- 6 additional fixes found via comprehensive audit

All command naming now verified correct:
- cass = session search tool (search, health, index, etc.)
- cm = cass-memory CLI (init, playbook, mark, etc.)
